name: Steamed Chocolate Pudding with Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and add sugar gradually.
2. Add the well beaten egg.
3. Sift flour with baking powder and salt, then add alternately with milk to the first mixture.
4. Add melted chocolate (over hot water).
5. Pour into a buttered mold.
6. Cover tightly and steam for two hours.
7. Serve with cream sauce.
CREAM SAUCE:
1/4 cup Butter
1 cup Powdered Sugar
1/4 cup Heavy Cream
1/2 teaspoon Vanilla
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar.
2. Add vanilla.
3. Fold in stiffly beaten cream until combined.
